title: Monday.com Cheat Sheet
description: Essential commands and patterns for using Monday.com effectively.

commands.command: curl -X POST https://api.monday.com/v2 -H "Authorization: YOUR_API_KEY" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data '{"query":"{ boards { id name } }"}'
commands.description: Fetch all boards from your Monday.com account.
commands.scenario: Use when you need to retrieve a list of all boards for management or analysis.

commands.description: Create a new item on a specific board.
commands.scenario: Use when you need to add a new task or item to a project board.

commands.command: query { items_by_column_values (board_id: 123456789, column_id: "status", column_value: "Done") { id name } }
commands.description: Query items by column values, such as status.
commands.scenario: Use to filter tasks that are marked as 'Done' on a board.

commands.command: mutation { change_column_value (board_id: 123456789, item_id: 987654321, column_id: "status", value: "{\"label\":\"In Progress\"}") { id } }
commands.description: Change the value of a column for a specific item.
commands.scenario: Use to update the status of a task to 'In Progress'.

commands.description: Delete an item from a board.
commands.scenario: Use when you need to remove a completed or obsolete task from a board.

commands.command: curl -X POST https://api.monday.com/v2 -H "Authorization: YOUR_API_KEY" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data '{"query":"{ users { id name email } }"}'
commands.description: Fetch all users from your Monday.com account.
commands.scenario: Use to retrieve a list of all users for team management.

commands.command: mutation { create_board (board_name: "New Project", board_kind: public) { id } }
commands.description: Create a new board in Monday.com.
commands.scenario: Use when starting a new project and needing a dedicated board.

commands.description: Retrieve information about the authenticated user.
commands.scenario: Use to verify the identity and details of the current API user.

commands.description: Duplicate an existing board with its structure.
commands.scenario: Use to create a template board for recurring projects.
Use when a project is completed and you want to archive the board.

commands.description: Add a subscriber to a board.
commands.scenario: Use to grant a team member access to a project board.

commands.description: Remove a subscriber from a board.
commands.scenario: Use to revoke access from a team member no longer involved in a project.
